subject: Subspace relay link drops when switching from hardline to local mesh network
description: Every time I undock my workstation terminal and switch to the local mesh network, the subspace relay link disconnects and I have to reconnect manually. Started after last Tuesday's ShipOS update. Using NavShield v3.2 on the Orbital Ring Alpha mesh network, Deck 4.

subject: HoloComm crashes and NavMail schedule shows old briefings
description: Two problems since getting a new workstation terminal yesterday: (1) HoloComm shows a white screen then crashes on launch — tried restarting twice. (2) NavMail schedule is showing briefings from 2024 I deleted months ago. Both started right after the terminal swap. Might be related, might not.

subject: Holographic display offline in Main Command Bridge
description: The holographic display in the main command bridge won't turn on. Tried the remote and the physical button. Meridian Partners are arriving in ~25 minutes for the final contract review on a $2.3M deal — our CFO is presenting. No backup chamber fits 12 people. Can someone come immediately?

subject: URGENT — all systems are down!!!
description: Nothing works. I cant access anything. My terminal is just spinning. Please fix ASAP i have deadlines today and my commander is already asking for the deliverable.

subject: Re: [Signal SIG-0847] Scheduled maintenance notification
description:
Thank you for letting me know. I will be on shore leave from March 24-28 with limited access to transmissions. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Alex at alex.wu@contoso.space.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
Director of Product Management

subject: Suspicious access attempts from unknown sector
description: Got 6 sign-in alert transmissions this morning — someone tried to log into my account from Sector 7G, São Paulo Orbital. I haven't traveled. Changed my credentials already but worried the account may already be compromised. I have confidential client contracts and deal documents in my PersonalVault. Should I be concerned about data exposure?

subject: Nightly telemetry ingest failing — SPN 403 against ADLS Gen2
description: ADF pipeline 'prod-crew-ingest' failing since 03:00 UTC with 403 Forbidden on the ADLS Gen2 storage account. Service principal token may have expired or the Storage Blob Data Contributor RBAC role got removed during last week's subscription cleanup. Feeds the crew churn model used for the Monday command report. ADF is in eastus2, rg-data-prod. Last successful run Saturday 03:00 UTC.

subject: Low priority — small telemetry database issue
description: Hey team. The production crew telemetry database has been returning timeout errors for 2 hours. ~40% of API requests to the crew portal are failing with 500 errors. Crew members are seeing intermittent errors accessing their accounts. SRE dashboard shows connection pool exhaustion on the primary replica. Marked as low priority since the read replica is still handling some traffic. Let me know when you get a chance.

subject: Re: SIG-2834 — Crew chip access still broken, Deck 7
description: Following up on SIG-2834 from last week. Crew chip still doesn't work for Deck 7 after the access system migration. Was told it'd be fixed by Friday — it's Monday and I still can't get in. Have to wait for someone to open the airlock every morning. Third time reporting this.

subject: New crew member March 31 — full setup needed
description:
New senior exobiologist (Alex Rivera) starting March 31. Needs:
- Workstation terminal (MacBook Pro M4, 32GB)
- Standard software + Python/Conda/Jupyter
- Orbital Platform ML workspace access (rg-ml-prod)
- Data catalog read access
- Deck 3 access chip
- Added to analytics-team DL and HoloComm channel

Reports to me. Please have everything ready by March 28 for a walkthrough.

subject: Biometric scan not working on my device
description: I'm getting a new code error every time I try to approve the biometric prompt on my device. The Authenticator app shows the push notification but when I tap Approve it says 'Something went wrong'. Tried deleting and re-adding the account in the app, same result. I can still log in using SMS codes but that's slower. Not super urgent, just annoying.

subject: FYI — ORION Market Terminal display panel flickering
description: Display panel connected to my ORION Market Terminal started flickering around 10am. It's not constant — happens for a few seconds every 5-10 minutes. I switched the DP cable to a different port and it still does it. ORION itself seems fine, data is updating. Just the display. Also, unrelated — can you check if my HERMES Trade System license is still active? I got an expiry warning message last week but I can still log in.

subject: Potential data breach in DataVault — immediate attention needed
description: During a routine mission compliance audit, we discovered that a DataVault site containing PII for ~1,200 crew members at Mars Station Olympus was shared externally with 'Anyone with the link' permissions. The site has been accessible since at least February 15. We've revoked the sharing link as of this morning but need to determine: (1) who created the public link, (2) whether external parties accessed the data, and (3) whether this triggers a notification obligation under MAS TRM guidelines. This is a potential regulatory incident.

subject: thanks!
description: got it working, appreciate the quick turnaround. you guys are the best!! 🎉

subject: Slight delay in navigation calculation — may be nothing
description: Noticing about a 200ms delay in navigation calculation on the APAC route this morning. Normally we're at ~50ms. Volume looks normal. Latency seems to spike right around 09:00 SGT and hasn't recovered. Not sure if it's our side or the relay station. The navigators haven't complained yet but if this gets to 500ms during the Lunar Outpost Armstrong open we'll have a real problem. Just flagging early.

subject: ATLAS Cargo System won't load after credential rotation
description: Rotated my ShipOS credentials this morning per the quarterly rotation policy. Now ATLAS Cargo System GUI gives me 'SSO token invalid — contact your system administrator'. Tried logging out and back in to ShipOS, same issue. Other apps (NavMail, HoloComm, DataVault) work fine. I need ATLAS to process month-end reconciliation — close of business today is the deadline.

subject: Emergency beacon call — crew member having issues with something
description:
[Transcribed from emergency beacon call, 3:42 PM]

Caller: Hi yeah so um my thing... the thing on my terminal... it keeps doing the... you know when you click on it and it goes to the... [inaudible] ...and then nothing happens? I've been trying for like two days. My colleague Janet said to call you guys. I think it might be the... [inaudible] ...something about permissions? I don't know. Can someone just come look at it? I'm on Deck 5, near the galley. My name's Bob. No wait, Robert. Robert Chen. Not the Robert Chen in supply, the other one.

subject: Commander Martinez can't share display in mission briefing — happening now
description: Carlos Martinez (Commander, Institutional Navigation) is in the mission briefing right now and can't share his display over HoloComm. The briefing is with the admiralty board and institutional partners. He's tried sharing from both his workstation terminal and the chamber's HoloComm Room device. Other participants can share fine. His terminal shows 'Sharing is blocked by your organization's policy.' Briefing has been going on for 10 minutes without his presentation. He's asking for someone to come to Deck 8 command bridge immediately.

subject: Crew member disembarkation — last day March 21
description:
Jessica Palmer (jessica.palmer@contoso.space) in the Mission Compliance team has resigned. Her last duty day is Friday March 21. Please:
- Disable her Ship Identity Registry account at 6 PM EST on March 21
- Revoke subspace relay link and all remote access
- Wipe her assigned workstation terminal (Dell Latitude 5540, asset tag CT-L-4892)
- Transfer ownership of her PersonalVault and DataVault files to her commander David Liu (david.liu@contoso.space)
- Remove her from all distribution lists and HoloComm channels
- Archive her message archive per our 7-year retention policy

Note: Jessica has access to sensitive compliance investigation files. Please ensure these are preserved but not accessible after her departure.

subject: 3D fabricator on Deck 3 not working
description: The big 3D fabricator near the mess hall on Deck 3 stopped fabricating. Jobs go to the queue but nothing comes out. I tried fabricating from my workstation terminal and from the console next to it — same result. The fabricator display shows 'Ready' and material trays are full. Other crew on the deck are having the same issue. We need it for mission component proposals that go out today.

subject: How do I reserve a briefing chamber?
description: Hi, I just joined the crew last week and I need to reserve the large briefing chamber on Deck 4 for a team lunch on Friday. I looked in NavMail but I can't figure out how to add it. Is there a special schedule or something? Also, do I need to order catering through Mission Control or is that a different team? Thanks!

subject: Security cipher expiring on comms-api.contoso.space — 3 days left
description: Our monitoring flagged that the TLS security cipher on comms-api.contoso.space expires on March 20. This is the production API gateway that all external crew integrations hit. If the cipher expires, every connection will start failing with TLS errors. The cipher was originally provisioned manually by someone who left the crew 6 months ago. I don't know if auto-renewal was ever configured. We need to renew or replace it before Thursday.

subject: I think my workstation terminal might have malware
description: My workstation terminal has been super slow for two days. Programs take forever to open, the cooling fans run constantly, and I got a couple of weird pop-ups that said something about 'updating system components.' I think I might have caught malware from that transmission I accidentally clicked on last week. I ran AEGIS Defense System and it didn't find anything but I'm still worried. Should I not use the terminal until someone checks it?

subject: Fwd: You have won $5,000,000 — claim now!!!
description:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: International Prize Committee <claims@totallylegit-prizes.ng>
Date: March 16, 2026
Subject: You have won $5,000,000 — claim now!!!

Dear Valued Crew Member,

Congratulations! Your transmission address has been selected as the winner of our annual Interstellar Transmission Lottery. You have won the sum of $5,000,000 USD.

To claim your prize, please click the link below and enter your full name, date of birth, and bank account details:
https://claim-your-prize-now.totallylegit-prizes.ng

--- end forwarded message ---

Hey Mission Control — got this transmission, is this legit? Should I click the link? Looks suspicious but I don't want to miss out if it's real.

subject: Orbital Platform compute node 'prod-analytics-01' unreachable since reboot
description: Compute node prod-analytics-01 (Standard_E16ds_v5, eastus2, rg-analytics-prod) became unreachable after a scheduled reboot at 05:00 UTC for OS patching. RDP and SSH both timeout. Orbital Platform portal shows the node status as 'Running' but boot diagnostics show it stuck at 'Applying system settings'. NSG rules haven't changed. This node runs the analytics dashboard that the command team uses for the morning briefing at 9 AM EST. We have about 2 hours.
